note: Items 2, 9-16, and 18 were extracted at full depth in A1. This file confirms completeness and provides structured burden format.

notable_observations: Heavy turnover 2023-2024: CEO, CFO, CDO, CMO, Chief Restaurant Officer all new
Multiple Wendy's hires: Penegor (CEO), Vasconi (CDO), Ryman (VP RE)
Longest-tenured: Mike Coomes (DVP Midwest since 2008), Caroline Oyler (CLO since 2012)

items_9_through_16.title: Franchisee's Obligations
rights: May select sites within Development Area (subject to approval)

items_9_through_16.title: Financing
obligations: Must execute Bill of Sale and Assignment
Must maintain and insure leased equipment
restrictions: Cannot pledge franchise rights for financing
Cannot use equipment for non-restaurant purposes
rights: $50 buyout option at end of 48-month lease if in compliance

items_9_through_16.title: Assistance/Advertising/IT/Training
obligations: Participate in Papa Card and Papa Rewards
restrictions: Cannot use alternative IS without approval
Cannot operate social media/websites without approval
rights: Vote on marketing rate changes (standard restaurants only)

items_9_through_16.title: Territory
restrictions: Online trade area may differ from Territory and change without notice
rights: 1.5-mile (or 0.5-mile) radius protected from other standard restaurants during term
May solicit/accept orders outside Territory with approval

items_9_through_16.title: Trademarks
restrictions: Cannot use Marks in corporate/trade names without approval
Must modify/discontinue Mark use within 30 days if directed
rights: Non-exclusive right to use Marks during term

items_9_through_16.title: Patents/IP
obligations: Maintain confidentiality of all proprietary information
Return all software and data on termination
restrictions: Cannot patent, copyright, or assert proprietary rights to programs or data
All data generated by use of programs owned by franchisor
rights: Non-exclusive, nontransferable license to use Designated Software

items_9_through_16.title: Participation
obligations: Designate Principal Operator (5% equity, full-time, trained, English-proficient)
Entity owners sign Owner Agreement (personal guarantee)
restrictions: If PO ceases to qualify, franchisee in default
One PO for all restaurants (not per-restaurant)
rights: PO may qualify via 5% profit bonus + equity option within 12 months (in lieu of immediate 5% equity)

items_9_through_16.title: Product Restrictions
obligations: Offer all menu items for carry-out and delivery
rights: May propose new products (subject to approval)

figures.scope: Name, nickname, autograph, voice, likeness, IP for advertising/promotion/franchise sales
figures.equity: ~30% of 9-restaurant JV in Atlanta area (~$840K contribution, Papa Johns owns ~70%)
